name: Privacy Cost as Equity Input: A Group Fairness Criterion for Differentially Private Machine Learning

description: arXiv:2607.16620v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Differential privacy (DP) is increasingly deployed to limit membership inference risk in machine-learning systems. Prior work has shown that DP-SGD can widen accuracy disparities across demographic groups, but this framing treats fairness as a purely outcome-side concern. We argue that privacy cost, the information leakage borne by each group, i...
author: Rakshit Naidu
